results.title: UGE Reports Q1 2024 Financial Results
results.content: * The net loss and adjusted net loss for the quarter was $4.0 MM, compared with $2.8 MM for Q1 2023, as a result of continued investment in developing UGE’s project portfolio. UGE is currently developing a significant volume of projects; and expects that losses will continue until a greater share of the Company’s portfolio has reached commercial operation. ## Investment Policy The investment seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, that correspond to two times (2x) the daily performance of the S&P Consumer Staples Select Sector Index. The index is designed to measure the performance of consumer staples companies included in the S&P 500 Index. Under normal circumstances, the fund will obtain leveraged exposure to at least 80% of its total assets in components of the index or in instruments with similar economic characteristics. The fund is non-diversified. ## Terms
